news.paragraph: Salesforce is demonstrating strong cash flow and expanding its AI capabilities through a new partnership with Pearson. Despite these developments, Citigroup has lowered its price target for the company from $200 to $188 while maintaining a neutral rating. There are no imminent earnings or regulatory catalysts mentioned in the recent news cycle.
